name: LLM Test Generator

releases.author: aldo-g
releases.description: Added multi language support and auto loading newest models

releases.author: aldo-g
releases.description:
## What's New in v1.1.0

### New Features
- Added support for Ollama to enable local LLM usage
- Improved error handling for JSON parsing issues
- Added more helpful error messages when using less capable models

### Technical Changes
- Added Ollama API integration
- Enhanced error messaging for better diagnostics
- Fixed TypeScript type issues

### How to Use Ollama
1. Download and install Ollama from [ollama.com](https://ollama.com)
2. Pull your preferred models (`ollama pull llama3`, etc.)
3. Select "Ollama (Local)" in plugin settings
4. Enter your model name and server URL (default: http://localhost:11434)
releases.name: 1.1.0 - Ollama Support

releases.author: aldo-g
releases.description:
This plugin creates tests based on individual files within an obsidian vault 

It creates questions with variable amounts of points, which users can answer to test their knowledge. once a user is done, they can have there tests marked by an LLM. 

A user can choose which LLM provider to use in order to generate and mark the tests
releases.name: Initial Release Obsidian-LLM-Test-Gen
